metadata.description: AI-agent skills for extracting structured brand packages from client assets — Figma variables, live website CSS, social copy, brand-guide PDFs, and reference screenshots — into a .brand/ directory plus a spec-compliant design.md and project-root brand.md.

plugins.name: brand-context
plugins.description: Generate and verify brand context for AI agents from a client's existing assets. Three skills: /brand-context:extract (full extraction pipeline — Figma tokens, web tokens, voice, multimodal overview, conflicts, design-system repo scan), /brand-context:check (completeness reporting against the tier schema), and /brand-context:audit (score a build target — file, URL, or screenshot — for brand adherence across token compliance, component reuse, composition, voice, visual atmosphere, and conflict consistency). Outputs a structured .brand/ directory plus design.md and brand.md at the project root. Playwright MCP recommended for full quality; falls back to native WebFetch when absent.
